'''鈭歸-p-p-d''' ('''kawapedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:filtrate|filtrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-p-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:filtrate|filtrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-p-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kawapedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwapedoko|thiwapedoko]] || [[word:jiwapedoko|jiwapedoko]] || [[word:shiwapedoko|shiwapedoko]] || [[word:kiwapedoko|kiwapedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowapedoko|thowapedoko]] || [[word:jowapedoko|jowapedoko]] || [[word:showapedoko|showapedoko]] || [[word:kowapedoko|kowapedoko]]
|-
